title: Bronze&Tin
description: No clutter, just bronze and tin that fit vanilla's spirit.
body:
![](https://drive.google.com/uc?export=view&id=1O5p-uHFp44CDVAUWA438e_6NsXzv8u0Y) ![](https://drive.google.com/uc?export=view&id=1yTyoYSxVuWEpduAOP5a1pUm1DBUWCKxd) >![](https://drive.google.com/uc?export=view&id=1y_rtOQQXf0db70on5CJ6tO1KHcvfThVN) **Bronze&Tin (Harmonium)** expands Minecraft with its seamless additions.
Clean, well-tuned, and vanilla-like. ![](https://drive.google.com/uc?export=view&id=1IHu2-D8YjHWvaGF_sh9QZzoMOU3YDLjm) ![](https://drive.google.com/uc?export=view&id=13tu8J0KTxAiiUVV35GUxXCqgcx8_ThSy) >![](https://drive.google.com/uc?export=view&id=1myVqB4brP7N1X7MtfeIo-wAPPhV9Vhiu) **Bronze&Tin (Harmonium):**
![](https://drive.google.com/uc?export=view&id=12-9inWfgg8nOuRNoqmUOLrQF95V1Ufkv) Copper-type blocks can be mined with wooden tools instead of stone ones.
![](https://drive.google.com/uc?export=view&id=12-9inWfgg8nOuRNoqmUOLrQF95V1Ufkv) Copper nugget.
![](https://drive.google.com/uc?export=view&id=12-9inWfgg8nOuRNoqmUOLrQF95V1Ufkv) Tin ore.
![](https://drive.google.com/uc?export=view&id=12-9inWfgg8nOuRNoqmUOLrQF95V1Ufkv) Tin decorative blocks with unique sounds.
![](https://drive.google.com/uc?export=view&id=12-9inWfgg8nOuRNoqmUOLrQF95V1Ufkv) Tin soldiers.
![](https://drive.google.com/uc?export=view&id=12-9inWfgg8nOuRNoqmUOLrQF95V1Ufkv) Tin bulb with 15 light level modes.
![](https://drive.google.com/uc?export=view&id=12-9inWfgg8nOuRNoqmUOLrQF95V1Ufkv) Tin armor trim.
![](https://drive.google.com/uc?export=view&id=12-9inWfgg8nOuRNoqmUOLrQF95V1Ufkv) Tin flute as a playable musical instrument.
![](https://drive.google.com/uc?export=view&id=12-9inWfgg8nOuRNoqmUOLrQF95V1Ufkv) Bronze decorative blocks with unique sounds.
![](https://drive.google.com/uc?export=view&id=12-9inWfgg8nOuRNoqmUOLrQF95V1Ufkv) Bronze bulb with 15 light level modes and copper bulb functionality.
![](https://drive.google.com/uc?export=view&id=12-9inWfgg8nOuRNoqmUOLrQF95V1Ufkv) Bronze smelt.
![](https://drive.google.com/uc?export=view&id=12-9inWfgg8nOuRNoqmUOLrQF95V1Ufkv) Bronze ingot.
![](https://drive.google.com/uc?export=view&id=12-9inWfgg8nOuRNoqmUOLrQF95V1Ufkv) Bronze nugget.
![](https://drive.google.com/uc?export=view&id=12-9inWfgg8nOuRNoqmUOLrQF95V1Ufkv) Bronze tools.
![](https://drive.google.com/uc?export=view&id=12-9inWfgg8nOuRNoqmUOLrQF95V1Ufkv) Bronze shield.
![](https://drive.google.com/uc?export=view&id=12-9inWfgg8nOuRNoqmUOLrQF95V1Ufkv) Bronze armor.
![](https://drive.google.com/uc?export=view&id=12-9inWfgg8nOuRNoqmUOLrQF95V1Ufkv) Bronze armor trim.
![](https://drive.google.com/uc?export=view&id=12-9inWfgg8nOuRNoqmUOLrQF95V1Ufkv) Bronze horse armor.
![](https://drive.google.com/uc?export=view&id=12-9inWfgg8nOuRNoqmUOLrQF95V1Ufkv) Bronze armor equipping sounds.
![](https://drive.google.com/uc?export=view&id=12-9inWfgg8nOuRNoqmUOLrQF95V1Ufkv) Nether slag that drops copper, tin and iron nuggets.
![](https://drive.google.com/uc?export=view&id=12-9inWfgg8nOuRNoqmUOLrQF95V1Ufkv) Some mobs can spawn naturally in bronze gear.
![](https://drive.google.com/uc?export=view&id=12-9inWfgg8nOuRNoqmUOLrQF95V1Ufkv) Stone tools are no longer obtainable because of bronze tools. (_can be toggled in config_) >![](https://drive.google.com/uc?export=view&id=1FVSBdK1U0gnTb9IMXrUSPVroy6R9yG8U) **Farmers Delight:**
![](https://drive.google.com/uc?export=view&id=12-9inWfgg8nOuRNoqmUOLrQF95V1Ufkv) Wooden knife.
![](https://drive.google.com/uc?export=view&id=12-9inWfgg8nOuRNoqmUOLrQF95V1Ufkv) Bronze knife.
![](https://drive.google.com/uc?export=view&id=12-9inWfgg8nOuRNoqmUOLrQF95V1Ufkv) Knives retexture.
![](https://drive.google.com/uc?export=view&id=12-9inWfgg8nOuRNoqmUOLrQF95V1Ufkv) Flint knife is no longer obtainable. (_can be toggled in config_) >![](https://drive.google.com/uc?export=view&id=1hiNeDoHJv_We91iAYtgNqmsm9MYR_1kD) **Friends and Foes:**
![](https://drive.google.com/uc?export=view&id=12-9inWfgg8nOuRNoqmUOLrQF95V1Ufkv) Unreliable tin button.
![](https://drive.google.com/uc?export=view&id=12-9inWfgg8nOuRNoqmUOLrQF95V1Ufkv) Long-pressing bronze button. >![](https://drive.google.com/uc?export=view&id=1QcqchCJA0YR3o__2MGgffMYIrneDB8vH) **Geophilic:**
![](https://drive.google.com/uc?export=view&id=12-9inWfgg8nOuRNoqmUOLrQF95V1Ufkv) Tin surface generation support. ![](https://drive.google.com/uc?export=view&id=1IHu2-D8YjHWvaGF_sh9QZzoMOU3YDLjm) ![](https://drive.google.com/uc?export=view&id=1Y1UN13rDStQVspKsbHx1b9IrBvc47vfq) >![](https://drive.google.com/uc?export=view&id=1myVqB4brP7N1X7MtfeIo-wAPPhV9Vhiu) **Configuration?**
![](https://drive.google.com/uc?export=view&id=1SJCP_GD9wPx3h4ZJVDkIdBQowAottHXL) Yes, some features of the mod are configurable by mod options. >![](https://drive.google.com/uc?export=view&id=1FVSBdK1U0gnTb9IMXrUSPVroy6R9yG8U) **Fabric port?**
![](https://drive.google.com/uc?export=view&id=1SJCP_GD9wPx3h4ZJVDkIdBQowAottHXL) Only when all planned content will be done. >![](https://drive.google.com/uc?export=view&id=1hiNeDoHJv_We91iAYtgNqmsm9MYR_1kD) **1.21.2+?**
![](https://drive.google.com/uc?export=view&id=1SJCP_GD9wPx3h4ZJVDkIdBQowAottHXL) As soon as possible. >![](https://drive.google.com/uc?export=view&id=1QcqchCJA0YR3o__2MGgffMYIrneDB8vH) **Discord server?**
![](https://drive.google.com/uc?export=view&id=1SJCP_GD9wPx3h4ZJVDkIdBQowAottHXL) As soon as possible. ![](https://drive.google.com/uc?export=view&id=1IHu2-D8YjHWvaGF_sh9QZzoMOU3YDLjm) [![](https://drive.google.com/uc?export=view&id=1IPxbf17uv-WwWTPMoYgfUnUv1FlqUT_f)](https://boosty.to/disketaa)
_(it costs around a dollar)_ >![](https://drive.google.com/uc?export=view&id=1jQ2cRJolV4oE4DRz9UaA0yNE-NLPHvbX) **Benefits:**
![](https://drive.google.com/uc?export=view&id=11by6jYxZen7LLFLC5DU9roR4AB5b6739) Regular sneak peek updates.
![](https://drive.google.com/uc?export=view&id=11by6jYxZen7LLFLC5DU9roR4AB5b6739) Your feature-add requests.
![](https://drive.google.com/uc?export=view&id=11by6jYxZen7LLFLC5DU9roR4AB5b6739) Custom discord role and private chat.
